_comment: Google Gemini API public list prices (paid tier), USD per 1M tokens. cacheRead is the implicit-caching discounted rate (~25% of input). cacheWrite is 0: Gemini CLI uses implicit caching, which has no separate write fee (explicit cache storage costs are not visible in session logs). For tiered models (2.5-pro >200k prompt) we use the <=200k tier; noted in docs/COST-METHODOLOGY.md. Matched by family substring in pricing.js. Update from https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing when prices change.
